title: Definitions
doc_html:
§98.2. Definitions

            The department shall define through rules adopted in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act necessary terms relevant to the comprehensive water resource management program.

            Acts 2025, No. 458, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§98.2.  Definitions
The department shall define through rules adopted in accordance with the
Administrative Procedure Act necessary terms relevant to the comprehensive water resource
management program.
Acts 2025, No. 458, §1, eff. Oct. 1, 2025.
